overall.description: A cinematic static shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a high-rise apartment bedroom overlooking Night City at night. The scene features a messy bed, checkered walls, and a panoramic window revealing a neon-lit futuristic skyline with occasional flying vehicles passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary in the apartment, looking out at the neon-lit cityscape through the window

black and white checkered wall pattern with mounted shelves and items
floor-to-ceiling panoramic window overlooking the city
futuristic cityscape with illuminated skyscrapers and neon advertisements
prominent skyscraper with vertical lighting on the right side of the view

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze from a cluttered cyberpunk bedroom overlooking the sprawling, neon-lit expanse of Night City at night. It begins with a focus on the interior's unmade bed in the foreground, framing a panoramic window that reveals the glowing futuristic skyline. As the camera remains static, the vibrant city lights persist, punctuated by the rhythmic passage of flying vehicles gliding across the horizon. The scene then settles into a hypnotic loop of urban activity, where the sparse aerial traffic continues to drift through the dark sky. Finally, the view lingers on the contrast between the messy intimacy of the high-rise apartment and the cold, electric scale of the metropolis beyond.
